tenantApiKey.title: GhostLayer Tenant API Key
tenantApiKey.description: Tenant API key pushed by IT admins via MDM/GPO. Overrides any user-set value.

localAgentUrl.title: GhostLayer Local Agent URL
localAgentUrl.description: URL of the local GhostLayer agent (e.g. http://localhost:4000). Overrides any user-set value.
